title: Buttery Flaky Tunisian Banana Stir-fry
description: This one-pot dish combines buttery and flaky elements with bananas for a delicious and quick breakfast.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: Whipped to make a fluffy base for the dish

ingredients.name: Cure (optional)
ingredients.notes: To add umami, can be omitted or replaced with salted butter in small amounts

instructions: Preheat your skillet over medium heat. Add butter and cure if using.
Gently break three eggs into the hot skillet, whisking constantly to create a smooth base for your dish.
Add sliced bananas to the skillet with eggs, stirring gently until bananas are slightly softened but still have some texture.
Season the mixture with salt (optional) and serve immediately while warm.
